footer.tagline:
A slice of Naples in the heart of Garwolin.
Artisan restaurant and pizzeria.
home.hero.subtitle: A slice of Naples in the heart of Garwolin
home.about.title: True Naples in the heart of Garwolin
home.about.story.title: Passion, craft, simplicity
home.about.story.content:
Nostrano means "ours" and "local" in Italian. It's not just another chain or a tourist spot. It's our personal project, a place born of a passion for craftsmanship and a love for the unhurried celebration of meals.

We created Nostrano — brothers Piotr and Paweł Ściślak — to bring a fragment of the Neapolitan soul to our hometown. Piotr, trained at the prestigious Akademia Pizzaioli and under the watchful eye of Arte Bianca's Patryk Nowakowski, makes sure that every pie coming out of our oven is perfect.

Our kitchen is a tribute to simplicity. Only the finest ingredients, an artisan approach to every detail, and the patience that real pizza demands.

home.features.title: Why Nostrano?
home.features.items.0.title: Artisan Passion
home.features.items.0.desc: The dough for our pizza proofs for hours, and the process of working it is an art. We don't compromise.
home.features.items.1.title: Certified Pizzaiolo
home.features.items.1.desc: We trained at the Akademia Pizzaioli under the guidance of masters. We know how to pay tribute to Italian tradition.
home.features.items.2.title: Atmosphere for Everyone
home.features.items.2.desc: A family vibe, a corner for kids and a smile on our faces. A place where the Garwolin community meets over good food.
home.features.items.3.title: Local Events
home.features.items.3.desc: Pizza-making workshops for the youngest, Italian cinema evenings and wine tastings. We live the life of the town.
home.events.title: Events
home.events.items.0.title: Pizza for the Little Ones
home.events.items.0.desc: We invite children to workshops on making real Neapolitan dough. Every little pizzaiolo leaves with pride and a pie made with their own hands.
home.events.items.1.title: Italian Wine Evening
home.events.items.1.desc: A tasting of carefully selected wines from southern Italy paired with appetizers. Perfect for those who want to explore Italian regions with a glass in hand.
home.events.items.2.title: Italian Cinema Evenings
home.events.items.2.desc: Atmospheric screenings of Italian films with subtitles. Cannes, Rome, Naples — we take you on a journey without leaving Garwolin.
home.kids.title: Zone for the Little Ones
home.kids.content:
We know that dinner with children can be a challenge. That's why we created a special corner for the youngest — with toys, books and a place to draw — so that you can take a moment to breathe and enjoy your meal.

Nostrano is not a party venue. It's a place where families can spend an evening together over real food, without rush and without stress.
home.kids.stats.0.label: play corner
home.kids.stats.1.label: for everyone
home.kids.stats.2.label: crayons and paper
home.kids.quote.text: Food is the most beautiful way of spending time together.
home.kids.quote.author: Piotr & Paweł Ściślak, owners
home.kids.quote.note: We're planning pizza workshops for kids — sign up to the list and be the first.

home.contact.title: We're Waiting for You
home.contact.subtitle: On weekends our dining room fills up fast. We recommend booking a table in advance.

home.testimonials.title: What our guests say
home.testimonials.subtitle: The opinions of our guests are the most important reward for us.
home.testimonials.items.0.text: "The best Neapolitan pizza I've had outside Italy. The dough is absolutely exceptional — light, with crispy edges. The service was warm and helpful. We'll be back for sure!"
home.testimonials.items.0.author: Agnieszka W.
home.testimonials.items.1.text: "An atmosphere straight from Naples — warm light, stone walls and the scent of basil from the doorstep. The bruschetta and burrata were superb. One of the best spots near Garwolin, no doubt."
home.testimonials.items.1.author: Tomasz K.
home.testimonials.items.2.text: "We came with the whole family — the kids played in the corner while we calmly enjoyed dinner. The prawns in white wine and butter sauce are a masterpiece. I rarely write reviews, but here I simply had to."
home.testimonials.items.2.author: Marta & Krzysztof S.
home.testimonials.items.3.text: "A restaurant I'd recommend to anyone. Piotr clearly knows what he's doing — the pizza dough is masterful. The Aperol Spritz came perfectly balanced. Book a table well in advance for the weekend!"
home.testimonials.items.3.author: Paweł R.
